mechanics.name: Sneak
mechanics.summary: Cast cheaper by returning an unblocked attacker; creatures enter tapped and attacking.

mechanics.name: Alliance
mechanics.summary: Triggers whenever another creature you control enters — rewards go-wide token streams.

mechanics.name: Disappear
mechanics.summary: End-step reward if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn.

mechanics.name: Mutagen
mechanics.summary: A token that sacrifices for a +1/+1 counter — the green/blue counters engine.

mechanics.name: Food
mechanics.summary: Sacrificial artifacts (the pizza cycle) that fuel lifegain and Disappear.

archetypes.name: Sneak Ninja aggro
archetypes.playstyle: Connect with evasive Ninjas, replay Sneak-returned ETBs, and grind value.

archetypes.name: Alliance go-wide
archetypes.playstyle: Stream creature ETBs to fire Alliance payoffs and swarm wide.

archetypes.name: Artifacts tempo
archetypes.playstyle: Cheap artifacts and Robots feed artifact-count checks behind premium red removal.

archetypes.name: Mutagen counters
archetypes.playstyle: Mutant ETBs make Mutagen tokens that snowball +1/+1 counters; splash removal.

archetypes.name: Food sacrifice
archetypes.playstyle: Expendable Foods, tokens and Mutagens leave the battlefield to switch on Disappear.

combos.note: Mutagen tokens become counters that make Mutants unblockable
Sneak re-buys the flying drain ETB
A hasty token every combat keeps Alliance firing
The Robot token turns on artifact-count and unblockable
Sacrifice fodder leaves the battlefield for Disappear
The Katana auto-equips each entering Ninja under the lord
